channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Democrats Are Not Afraid of the Communists Their Party Is Electing; They Just Dislike Losing Their Jobs to Them
item.description: A common online notion, often held by naive conservatives, suggests that the recent string of victories in New York for self-proclaimed 'democrat...'

item.title: SCOTUS Rules Asylum Seekers in Mexico Have Not Arrived in the U.S.
item.description: The Supreme Court upheld a Trump-era policy that limits asylum claims from migrants waiting in Mexico.

item.title: Americans Trust Doctors More Than Government After 250 Years
item.description: Public trust in the federal government remains low, though political leanings have shifted.

item.title: Five Key Quotes from Alito's Opinion on Hawaii Gun Law
item.description: Justice Alito's majority opinion in Wolford v. Lopez included several notable statements.
